title: UB11 1HB, Virtus HoldCo Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3903PD/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Virtus HoldCo Limited Installation name: Virtus Data Centres Stockley Park Campus Permit number: EPR/AP3903PD  "
